name: POWERDYNE INTERNATIONAL, INC.
business: Powerdyne International, Inc., through its subsidiary Creative Motion Technology, LLC, designs and custom builds industrial servomotors (both brush and brushless) primarily used in robotics for semiconductor manufacturing equipment. It also operates Frame One, a custom picture framing shop serving local customers. The company services Original Equipment Manufacturers in the semiconductor market and also sells custom framing to schools, artists, and other local clients.
sellsTo: Original Equipment Manufacturers in the semiconductor market
local schools, colleges, artist guilds, artists, interior decorators/designers, museums, photographers, art galleries and theaters

exposures.sentence: CM Tech’s current market focus is on the niche motor demands for low volume, high-quality cost-effective motors which are primarily used in industrial robotics for the semiconductor manufacturing industry.
The motors that CM Tech currently has in production primarily provide the X, Y, and Z axis articulation in factory automation robots.
